heading: House emergency operations positions
label: 5502 House emergency operations positions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 75f of this titleSection is from the Congressional Operations Appropriations Act, 2002, which is title I of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2002.

children.text: The Office of the Chief Administrative Officer.
The Office of the Sergeant at Arms.

children.heading: Duties
children.label: b Duties
children.text: The duty of the personnel appointed to a position established under this section shall be to ensure the continuity of the operations of the House of Representatives during periods of emergency, in accordance with the direction of the head of the office in which the position is established.

children.heading: Rate of pay
children.label: c Rate of pay
children.text: The annual rate of pay provided for a position established under this section shall be determined by the head of the office in which the position is established.

children.heading: Appointment authority
children.label: d Appointment authority
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the head of the office in which a position is established under this section shall have the exclusive authority to appoint personnel to such a position.
